A''' [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]]''' was the owner and announcer for the famed [[Circus Horrificus/Legends|Circus Horrificus]]. The [[Circus/Legends|circus]] was well known for [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiatorial]] events which usually pitted one or more beings against savage creatures from around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the ringmaster had a run in with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]] when an illegal [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] ring of [[Akk dog/Legends|akk dogs]] was traced back to him.
